_comment: Hand-curated bench queries for the retrieval bench harness. Mix of identifier-shaped (where hybrid scoring + gating should win) and prose-shaped (where reranking might help). Relevant chunk IDs are author-curated against a synthetic AeroScript-style fixture corpus; ship with at least 15 to give the bench enough signal, with room to grow toward 30+ over time. The bench's nDCG@5 number reflects the implementer's relevance taste — that subjectivity is acknowledged here so future re-curation can adjust it intentionally.

queries.name: configure homing prose
queries.query: how do I configure homing on each axis

queries.name: explain coordinated motion
queries.query: explain coordinated motion across multiple axes

queries.name: set up encoder feedback
queries.query: how to set up encoder feedback for a stage

queries.name: fault recovery prose
queries.query: what to do when an axis faults during a move

queries.name: task lifecycle
queries.query: how does the task lifecycle work

queries.name: ramp shape selection
queries.query: which ramp shape should I use for smooth motion
